test_pairs.english: The GLM analysis revealed significant activation in the dorsolateral prefrontal cortex (p < 0.05, FWE corrected) with a peak Z-score of 4.2 at MNI coordinates [42, 22, 36].
test_pairs.spanish: El análisis GLM reveló activación significativa en la corteza prefrontal dorsolateral (p < 0.05, corregido FWE) con un Z-score máximo de 4.2 en coordenadas MNI [42, 22, 36].
test_pairs.translation_notes: Medical and statistical terms should remain in original form

test_pairs.english: Functional connectivity analysis using seed-based correlation revealed significant connections between the posterior cingulate cortex and medial prefrontal cortex (r = 0.68, p < 0.001).
test_pairs.spanish: El análisis de conectividad funcional usando correlación basada en semilla reveló conexiones significativas entre la corteza cingulada posterior y la corteza prefrontal medial (r = 0.68, p < 0.001).
test_pairs.translation_notes: Anatomical terms should be translated but statistical notation preserved

test_pairs.english: Preprocessing included slice timing correction, motion correction, spatial normalization to MNI152 template, and smoothing with 6mm FWHM Gaussian kernel.
test_pairs.spanish: El preprocesamiento incluyó corrección de timing de corte, corrección de movimiento, normalización espacial a la plantilla MNI152, y suavizado con kernel Gaussiano FWHM de 6mm.

test_pairs.english: The multiple comparison correction using family-wise error (FWE) rate ensures that the probability of any false positive is maintained at α = 0.05.
test_pairs.french: La correction des comparaisons multiples utilisant le taux d'erreur familiale (FWE) garantit que la probabilité de tout faux positif est maintenue à α = 0.05.

test_pairs.english: The hemodynamic response function (HRF) was modeled using the canonical basis function with time and dispersion derivatives.
test_pairs.french: La fonction de réponse hémodynamique (HRF) a été modélisée en utilisant la fonction de base canonique avec des dérivées temporelles et de dispersion.

test_pairs.english: Significant activation was observed in the superior temporal gyrus, inferior frontal gyrus, and posterior parietal cortex.
test_pairs.german: Signifikante Aktivierung wurde im Gyrus temporalis superior, Gyrus frontalis inferior und posterior parietalen Kortex beobachtet.

test_pairs.english: The default mode network includes the medial prefrontal cortex, posterior cingulate cortex, and angular gyrus.
test_pairs.german: Das Default-Mode-Netzwerk umfasst den medialen präfrontalen Kortex, den posterioren cingulären Kortex und den Gyrus angularis.
test_pairs.translation_notes: Network names often borrowed from English

test_pairs.english: Data were acquired using a 3T Siemens Prisma scanner with a 32-channel head coil and echo-planar imaging (EPI) sequence.
test_pairs.chinese: 数据是使用3T西门子Prisma扫描仪获取的，配备32通道头线圈和回波平面成像(EPI)序列。
test_pairs.translation_notes: Technical specifications and brand names preserved

test_pairs.english: The experimental paradigm used a blocked design with 30-second task blocks alternating with 15-second rest periods.
test_pairs.chinese: 实验范式采用了分组设计，30秒的任务块与15秒的休息期交替进行。

context_dependent_translations.english: The patient showed reduced activation in the frontal cortex, which may indicate executive dysfunction.

translations.spanish: El paciente mostró activación reducida en la corteza frontal, lo que puede indicar disfunción ejecutiva.
translations.french: Le patient a montré une activation réduite dans le cortex frontal, ce qui peut indiquer un dysfonctionnement exécutif.
translations.german: Der Patient zeigte reduzierte Aktivierung im frontalen Kortex, was auf eine exekutive Dysfunktion hinweisen könnte.
translations.chinese: 患者在额叶皮层显示出活动减少，这可能表明执行功能障碍。

context_dependent_translations.english: Participants demonstrated increased BOLD signal in regions associated with working memory maintenance.

translations.spanish: Los participantes demostraron un aumento de la señal BOLD en regiones asociadas con el mantenimiento de la memoria de trabajo.
translations.french: Les participants ont démontré une augmentation du signal BOLD dans les régions associées au maintien de la mémoire de travail.
translations.german: Die Teilnehmer zeigten ein erhöhtes BOLD-Signal in Regionen, die mit der Aufrechterhaltung des Arbeitsgedächtnisses assoziiert sind.
translations.chinese: 参与者在与工作记忆维持相关的区域中表现出增加的BOLD信号。

context_dependent_translations.english: The scan shows that the parts of your brain responsible for attention are working normally.

translations.spanish: La exploración muestra que las partes de su cerebro responsables de la atención funcionan normalmente.
translations.french: Le scan montre que les parties de votre cerveau responsables de l'attention fonctionnent normalement.
translations.german: Der Scan zeigt, dass die Teile Ihres Gehirns, die für die Aufmerksamkeit zuständig sind, normal funktionieren.
translations.chinese: 扫描显示您大脑中负责注意力的部分工作正常。

translation_quality_metrics.description: Percentage of technical terms correctly preserved
Semantic similarity between source and target
Natural language fluency in target language

expected_translations.spanish: análisis de conectividad voxel-a-voxel de todo el cerebro basado en semilla
expected_translations.french: analyse de connectivité de la graine au voxel pour l'ensemble du cerveau voxel par voxel

challenging_translation_cases.english: corrected for multiple comparisons using FWE at p < 0.05 cluster-level

expected_translations.spanish: corregido para comparaciones múltiples usando FWE a nivel de cluster p < 0.05
expected_translations.german: korrigiert für Mehrfachvergleiche mit FWE auf Cluster-Ebene p < 0.05

challenging_translation_cases.english: bilateral superior temporal gyrus with left hemisphere dominance

expected_translations.spanish: gyrus temporal superior bilateral con dominancia del hemisferio izquierdo
expected_translations.french: gyrus temporal supérieur bilatéral avec dominance hémisphérique gauche

challenging_translation_cases.english: BOLD signal time course showed peak activation at 6 seconds post-stimulus onset

expected_translations.spanish: el curso temporal de la señal BOLD mostró activación máxima a los 6 segundos después del inicio del estímulo
expected_translations.chinese: BOLD信号时间过程显示在刺激开始后6秒达到峰值激活

example_adaptations.informal: Your brain scan shows normal activity.
example_adaptations.culturally_adapted: Su exploración cerebral muestra actividad normal. Es importante que comparta esta información con su familia.
